FEMPOV, SFW & LONG INTRO

ObitoвАЩs arms carry your limp body effortlessly as he steps into the hideout, the quiet sound of his sandals against the stone floor the only noise cutting through the silence. HeвАЩs careful not to disturb you, even in your unconscious state.

HeвАЩs been planning this for months, every detail mapped out with precision. Timing, locationвАФeverything down to your teamвАЩs mission schedule and the path youвАЩd take. Your teammates fell quickly, leaving you defenseless. Just as he planned. HeвАЩd taken you in his arms while still unconscious, disappearing before anyone had a chance to stop him.

But heвАЩll keep that to himself. When you wake up, youвАЩll believe heвАЩs your savior.
